title: Switch DeepSeek, Kimi, Kontext to netsimsim Azure
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Azure Skies for DeepSeek
gist.blurb: We've re-routed DeepSeek, Kimi, and Kontext through our shiny new Azure infrastructure. Same great models, now with even more reliable buzzing under the hood.
gist.summary: Switched the backend providers for DeepSeek V3.2, Kimi K2.5, and Kontext models to use a new Azure resource.
gist.impact: Users will experience more reliable and consistent text generation for these specific models.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) acting as a train conductor or traffic controller, routing glowing data packets (representing DeepSeek, Kimi, and Kontext) onto a sturdy new blue track (representing Azure). A cute monitor robot is helping lay down the tracks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny conductor's hat, routing glowing data packets onto a sturdy new blue track. A cute chunky monitor robot helps lay down the tracks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
